design_philosophy: A fresh, vibrant marketing-focused aesthetic moving away from typical sterile SaaS layouts. It uses soft pastels grounded by deep charcoal text and hard borders (Neo-brutalist twist) to create a structured, approachable, and creative 'marketing vibe' that remains intuitive for non-technical users.

spacing_and_layout.calendar_grid: grid grid-cols-7 gap-0 border-l border-t border-[#1C1C1C]
spacing_and_layout.calendar_cell: min-h-[120px] p-2 border-r border-b border-[#1C1C1C] bg-white transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50

components.cards: bg-white border-2 border-[#1C1C1C] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#1C1C1C] transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white border-2 border-[#1C1C1C] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FDE74C] text-[#1C1C1C] border-2 border-[#1C1C1C] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg
buttons.outline: bg-white text-[#1C1C1C] border-2 border-[#1C1C1C] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1C1C1C] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg

components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-[#1C1C1C] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B6B] focus:border-[#1C1C1C] font-medium transition-all shadow-[inset_2px_2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
components.badges: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-full border border-[#1C1C1C] flex items-center gap-1
components.sidebar: w-64 border-r-2 border-[#1C1C1C] bg-white h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 p-6 flex flex-col gap-8 z-50

iconography.style: duotone or bold for a playful but professional look

interactions.hover_states: Elements should lift up (-translate-y-1) and cast a slightly larger hard shadow to emphasize the tactile Neo-Brutalist feel.
interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring focus (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B6B] focus:outline-none).

avatars.description: User avatar for the top right profile dropdown.
Team member avatar for post reviewer assignments.

content_thumbnails.description: Example thumbnail for a planned social media reel/post in the review sheet.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements must include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='calendar-next-month-btn', data-testid='new-post-modal-btn', data-testid='post-status-select'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Outfit' (Headings) and 'Manrope' (Body) from Google Fonts.
Implement the layout with a fixed Left Sidebar and a Main Content area.
The primary view is the Marketing Calendar. Build a robust grid layout for the Monthly view. Implement a Weekly and Daily toggle as well.
Calendar cells must look like large bento boxes with 1px dark borders. Use absolute positioning inside relative cells for event pills if there are many, or simple flex columns.
For the 'Post Planning' feature, use a Shadcn Sheet (sliding in from the right) or Dialog to create/edit posts.
Ensure Multi-select is implemented properly for platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, etc.), perhaps using command/combobox from Shadcn UI.
For Auto-Events (Global/Indian events), display them in the calendar cells as subtle, non-intrusive text/icons at the bottom of the date cell.

Embrace the Neo-Brutalist aesthetic. Use the specified custom shadow classes (`shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1C1C1C]`) on cards and buttons instead of the default Shadcn soft shadows. Override Shadcn defaults to match this tactile, fresh marketing vibe.
Use Phosphor icons heavily to complement the modern, creative tone.
Ensure full responsive behavior for the calendar. On mobile, the month view might switch to a list view.
